body_transformation: Nidoqueen's dark blue spikes transform into jagged, electric-blue lightning-bolt spines along her spine, each tip crackling with vibrant yellow energy. Her pale cream underbelly shifts to a smooth, conductive silver with neon green circuit patterns tracing her abdomen. The curled spiral tail tip gains sparking fur tips and glowing circuit patterns, while her rounded head adopts sharper angular features with pointed ears that now shimmer with electric energy. Her skin texture becomes sleek and metallic, reflecting light with subtle neon green highlights across her muscular frame.
signature_feature: Spine spines: jagged electric-blue lightning-bolt spines with vibrant yellow energy crackles and neon green circuit patterns.
